title: Lively Plants
description: Makes Minecraft's plants more beautiful with 3D models and variations in block models.
body:
🌿 Lively Plants
-
🢂 Makes Minecraft's plants prettier using complex (but not too complex) models and model variation.

🢂 Affects (6) different plants so far

🢂 Vanilla style




💡 Info & Help
-
🢂 Ask for help in my [Discord Server](https://discord.gg/EC5j5Z9bFW)
